programs.title: The Chase
programs.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Charmian, Raymond, Amanda and Richard work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.

programs.title: Seven News At 4
programs.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programs.title: The Chase Australia
programs.desc: Hosted by Larry Emdur, The Chase is a general knowledge race where players must ensure they stay one step ahead of the Chaser, some of the finest quiz brains in Australia. The Chase is on...

programs.title: Home and Away
programs.desc: Mali struggles to find applicants for his new position at the Surf Club. Kirby turns up to apologise, believing she's partially responsible for his predicament.

programs.title: SAS: AUS v ENG
programs.desc: There's a surprise twist for recruits during the marksman task. Later, they tackle claustrophobic tunnels before a beasting pushes more than one recruit to their limit.
